mapper.select: SELECT alert_id FROM special_alert_setting WHERE alert_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%') OR key_word LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%')
SELECT special_report_id FROM special_report_setting WHERE report_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%') OR monitor_keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%')
SELECT * FROM special_alert_setting ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM special_report_setting WHERE status_enabled = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
